title: [MTR4] UK Stop Markers
description: A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway that adds UK-style stop markers for your platforms! Help guide your trains into the station at just the right place with these informational totems.
body:
# UK Stop Markers pack for MTR
### This pack is _only_ compatible with MTR4. 

This is a resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway that adds UK-style stop markers for your platforms! Help guide your trains into the station at just the right place with these informational totems. These are Decoration Objects (eyecandies) and can be placed and positioned using the according block.

![A collection of some of the stop markers included in the pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1b60ff78a122d9875140677c14ab280ce3c3b6a_0.webp)

This pack contains the following variants
- S Car Stop
- 2 Car Stop
- 2-3 Car Stop
- 3 Car Stop
- 4 Car Stop
- 4-12 Car Stop
- 5 Car Stop
- 5/6 Car Stop
- 6 Car Stop
- 6-8 Car Stop
- 7 Car Stop
- 8 Car Stop
- 9 Car Stop
- 10 Car Stop
- 11 Car Stop
- 12 Car Stop
- Platform 1A - S Car Stop
- Platform 1B - S Car Stop
- Platform 2A - S Car Stop
- Platform 2B - S Car Stop

---
